elements.description: Shower zone in section, box '3 +3.63 2', with shower head (SW.) mounted on the left wall, soap dish (SP.), and floor-mounted (K.) tap visible
Main WC zone in section, box '3 +3.65 2', WC.1-type toilet fixture and PH. fitting shown
granite/tiled counter with mirror (M.) and LAV.1 basin, right side of section, height dims 1.00/2.00/0.20/0.20/0.60 on the right edge
A stepped floor-level profile is drawn at the base of the section (small step shapes), consistent with the room sitting at +3.63/+3.65 relative to the corridor outside
Oval/hexagon '2' and hexagon '3' tagged callouts at high level on the walls

warnings: Second of 2 views on this page; sibling is the plan view _view1_wc2_plan.json.

The dense vertical dimension chain on the right side of the section (0.70/1.00/2.00/0.20/0.20/0.60) has overlapping/nested annotations similar to WC.1's equivalent section (หน้า17) -- recorded as a flat set rather than individually attributed.
This section confirms the shower zone (อาบน้ำ) as a genuinely separate fixture arrangement from the main WC zone, both within the single WC.2 room -- matching the plan view's finding.
